# Manta Bridge

> Manta Bridge is the canonical Ethereum–Manta Pacific route: deposit ETH or allowlisted ERC-20s, then withdraw through proof, challenge, and finalization.

## Key facts
- Route: source chain  destination chain
- Deposit: typically minutes
- Withdraw: may need proving/finalization
- Gas: native asset on both chains
- Custody: Non-custodial — your wallet signs
- Verify: Use the official contracts; beware fake bridge sites

- [What is Manta Bridge?](https://mantabridge.github.io/#what)
- [How bridging works](https://mantabridge.github.io/#how)
- [Depositing to the destination](https://mantabridge.github.io/#deposit)
- [Withdrawing back](https://mantabridge.github.io/#withdraw)
- [Time and fees](https://mantabridge.github.io/#fees)
- [Is Manta Bridge safe?](https://mantabridge.github.io/#safety)
- [Problems and fixes](https://mantabridge.github.io/#troubleshoot)
- [FAQ](https://mantabridge.github.io/#faq)
